_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: Cell viability/proliferation of NF2-deficient MNs was effectively inhibited by AZD2014 with IC50 values < 100 nM after 72 hours of treatment
details: IC50 values < 100 nM after 72 hours of treatment in NF2-deficient primary meningioma cells
